text: Your demo is a script, not a screen recording. Argo turns a Playwright walkthrough into a polished product video with voiceover, camera direction, and smart export built in.

overlay.title: Demos as code.
overlay.body: Voiceover, overlays, camera effects, preview, and export — one pipeline.

text: Start with argo init, or convert an existing Playwright test with init dash dash from. Scenes, narration, and overlays live in one manifest. Omit the text field for silent scenes.

overlay.title: Playwright is the source of truth.
overlay.body: Scaffold, convert, or write from scratch.

text: Seven TTS engines. Start local with Kokoro, bring a HuggingFace model, switch to open AI or Eleven Labs and many more for the polished cut, or clone your own voice with MLX audio.

overlay.text: 7 engines — local, cloud, or your own voice

text: Preview turns your recording into an edit bay. Scrub by scene, rewrite a line, regenerate just that clip, and re-export without re-recording.
Direct the viewer's eye with code. Spotlight a button, pulse a focus ring, dim the noise, highlight the cursor, and celebrate with confetti.
Export does more than encode. Argo adds transitions between scenes, compresses dead time with speed ramp, writes subtitles and chapters, and renders gif alongside the MP4.

overlay.title: Smart export, not just encoding.
overlay.body: Transitions, speed ramp, subtitles, chapters, GIF — one timeline.

text: As your demo catalog grows, Argo scales with it. Validate catches wiring bugs, doctor checks the environment, pipeline dash dash all renders everything, and the dashboard shows status at a glance.
Under the hood, it is still Playwright. A few helpers for narration, overlays, typing, and camera effects turn familiar test code into a demo system.
Overlays adapt to your page. Toggle the theme, and the overlay contrast follows automatically. One pipeline, every output you need.

overlay.title: npm i -D @argo-video/cli
overlay.body: npx argo init && npx argo pipeline my-demo

text: This demo was recorded by Argo. Directed by code. Shipped by one command.

overlay.text: Recorded by Argo. Directed by code.
